title: Christopher Calger
compiled_truth: Christopher Calger is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-08-16), Christopher Calger sent 107 and received 1154 emails, totalling 1261 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (78), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (24), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (23), [Tracy Ngo](people/tracy-ngo) (9), [Christian Yoder](people/christian-yoder) (8).
